decisions: Lume reframed: extensible AI platform (capabilities + templates), not just an IDP. SDLC is the first/bootstrap template.
No permanent tech constraints (K8s included) — opinions become swappable options behind clean contracts. Only principles are non-negotiable.
Earned-autonomy model: high-blast/irreversible actions human-gated by default; guardrails relax as Lume proves reliability.
CLAUDE.md to be reconciled to the broader platform framing in a later follow-up (WORK-0015).
Orchestrator: general capability/template-aware core, SDLC as first instance — but 'design general, build simple' (Phase 0/1 builds simplest SDLC-only realisation; generality RESERVED).
Decomposition is a planner capability (inline for SDLC build-now; extracted when a 2nd template exists).

5 intent tools; lume_task carries lifecycle intents (RESERVED), lume_query does structured discovery; lume_manage is NOT one of the five — a potential sixth tool introduced only if lifecycle traffic demands it.
Stateless orchestrator over a swappable durable store (embedded local build-now; mechanism deferred to WORK-0005).
5-class failure model + halt-and-surface on partial failure (compensation RESERVED for destructive/invisible effects).

Agent boundaries partitioned by artifact class (domain/purpose), not create-vs-mutate: Infra owns workload manifests + deployment-composition layer (incl. CI); Provisioning owns repos/tenants/Crossplane-claims/scaffold; Obs owns observability artifacts + obs-plane workloads; Coding owns app source; Work owns work items.
Work is a deterministic service (ACT->VALIDATE only, no inference); orchestrator owns the per-workflow branch+PR and is sole writer of work-item status during execution; auto-remediation RESERVED.
notes: WORK-0003 complete: docs/agent-boundaries.md, decisions from interview (artifact-class split), hardened through 3 adversarial-review cycles to 0 contested design. On branch docs/work-0003-agent-boundaries; PR pending. Active empty per /iterate; next /iterate selects WORK-0004 (security & auth requirements). Downstream: WORK-0007 (serialisation + crash-safety proof), WORK-0010/0011, WORK-0004, WORK-0012/0013, WORK-0015 (CLAUDE.md reconciliation, 6 items).
